blocked_claims: This record does not close LT-L3-W10.
This record does not configure Entra Conditional Access or prove MFA enforcement.
This record does not run Entra SSO, create an authenticated session, or call a protected API.
This record does not prove unauthenticated, expired-token, or cross-tenant rejection behavior.
This record does not bootstrap User-to-Employee mapping or reconcile Entra object ids to Employee.user_id.
This record does not write or count mapping audit events.
This record does not satisfy R13, G5, or L3-EXIT.
This record does not treat the user review waiver as valid review evidence.
